case_title: MARY HAYNES et al VS. MIDAS MUFFLER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYNES, MARY HAYNES, ALBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MIDAS MUFFLER THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HAYNES, MARY HAYNES, ALBERT AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS MUFFLER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY THE DEFENDANT. PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-23-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDAS MUFFLER
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDAS MUFFLER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
